title: cyclosorus nanus
intro: Cyclosorus nanus, also known as the dwarf lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, the Cyclosorus nanus has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of this plant include the potential treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as the reduction of fever and pain. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of the Cyclosorus nanus are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall health and well-being.
